title: Ability to filter out tasks by Status on "My Work"
excerpt: Currently Monday.com offers a filter to hide completed task on “My Work” view, we would also like to be able to filter out tasks that are “Not Needed”, “Not Started” or “On Hold”. Our My work tab is not working because o…

posts.author: NaguS (Nagu S)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently Monday.com offers a filter to hide completed task on “My Work” view, we would also like to be able to filter out tasks that are “Not Needed”, “Not Started” or “On Hold”. Our My work tab is not working because our item counts are more than 1000 items on the “My work” tab and having the ability to filter by these statuses will help
